name: Town Guard
description: A professional soldier employed by a city or town to maintain order, patrol the streets, and man the gates. Town guards wear chainmail over a padded gambeson and carry a one-handed sword and round shield. They are disciplined enough to hold a line but rarely see the kind of combat that would make them elite fighters. Most are motivated more by steady pay and civic duty than glory.
tactics: The town guard fights defensively, planting behind their shield and counter-attacking when they deflect a blow. They will pursue fleeing suspects and call out hidden threats to their allies. Guards prefer to work together and will try to spot hidden enemies before engaging directly.

actions.name: Sword Strike
actions.description: The guard delivers a direct slash or thrust with their one-handed sword.

actions.name: Apprehend
actions.description: The guard singles out a creature they can see within a short (10 unit) distance and moves up to 3 units directly toward them. If the guard ends this movement adjacent to the target, they can attempt to take the grapple action.

actions.name: Spot
actions.description: The guard scans the area, making a Senses check to detect any hidden or Obscured creatures within a very short (5 unit) radius. Any hidden creature within this radius must make a contested stealth check against the guard's senses to remain hidden.

actions.name: Raise Shield
actions.description: The guard takes a modified defend action, bracing behind their light shield. If the guard makes a successful deflection check against an adjacent attacker making a melee attack in this way, they immediately make a counter-attack with their Sword Strike action with a bonus die.

traits.name: On Watch
traits.description: While the town guard is on patrol or manning a post in a familiar settlement, they gain a bonus die to senses checks to detect hidden or disguised creatures. Unless they are ambushed, the guard always takes a turn during the preparation phase of combat.
